actions.description: Runs bash with the data input
actions.label: Vuln_Nikto
actions.name: execute_bash

parameters.name: code
parameters.value:
command -v perl >/dev/null 2>&1 || apk add --no-cache perl perl-net-ssleay perl-json perl-xml-writer git
[ -d "nikto" ] || git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/sullo/nikto.git
cd nikto/program && perl nikto.pl -host $exec.full_url -ask no -Tuning b 2>&1

actions.description: Runs bash with the data input
actions.label: Vuln_FFUF
actions.name: execute_bash

parameters.name: code
parameters.value:
command -v ffuf >/dev/null 2>&1 || apk add --no-cache ffuf curl
echo "config.bak" > wordlist.txt
ffuf -w wordlist.txt -u $exec.full_url/FUZZ -mc 200 -k -s -p 0.1 -rate 50 > /dev/null
echo -e "\n--- PREUVE CONCRÈTE : CONTENU DU FICHIER SENSIBLE ---"
curl -k -s $exec.full_url/config.bak

actions.description: Runs bash with the data input
actions.label: Vuln_TestSSL
actions.name: execute_bash

parameters.name: code
parameters.value:
command -v bash >/dev/null 2>&1 || apk add --no-cache bash openssl procps git
[ -d "testssl.sh" ] || git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/drwetter/testssl.sh.git
./testssl.sh/testssl.sh --quiet --color 0 $exec.full_url

actions.description: Runs bash with the data input
actions.label: Vuln_Nmap
actions.name: execute_bash

parameters.name: code
parameters.value:
command -v nmap >/dev/null 2>&1 || apk add --no-cache nmap
nmap -Pn -F $exec.clean_target

actions.description: Runs bash with the data input
actions.label: Dig
actions.name: execute_bash

parameters.name: code
parameters.value:
command -v dig >/dev/null 2>&1 || apk add --no-cache bind-tools
dig $exec.clean_target
